content.rendered:
This year’s COMPUTEX Taipei was held from May 28 to June 1 at the Taipei World Trade Center Nangang Exhibition Hall, where AMI hosted a booth featuring the latest developments in AMI products and services.

Throughout the event, the booth was filled with partners and guests excited to learn how AMI provides comprehensive, end-to-end solutions that fulfill the needs of various market segments in the computing industry.

We prepared a brief video with some of the sights from this year’s event on our AMI TV YouTube™ channel. Many thanks to our AMI Taiwan team for their great work in preparing and staffing the booth as well as collecting these images over the course of the event.

And for all who visited us during COMPUTEX Taipei 2019, we thank you for your visit and look forward to seeing you again next year!
